mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyQstnListRspnsDelete 설 명 : 설문문항목록답변삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID IN
#{item.srvyQstnId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyExcelDownQstnList 설 명 : 설문엑셀다운문항목록 */ SELECT SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO , QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID , QSTN.QSTN_TTL , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID , VWITM.VWITM_CTS , VWITM.VWITM_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN ON SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM VWITM ON VWITM.SRVY_QSTN_ID = QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' WHERE SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND (SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} OR UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId})) ORDER BY SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID, SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO, VWITM.VWITM_SEQNO

/* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyExcelDownQstnRspnsList 설 명 : 설문엑셀다운문항답변목록 */ SELECT PTCP.SRVY_ID , PTCP.USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = PTCP.USER_ID) AS USERNM , SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID , RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID , RSPNS.SRVY_VWITM_ID , CASE WHEN VWITM.ETC_INPTYN = 'Y' THEN RSPNS.RSPNS ELSE VWITM.VWITM_CTS END AS VWITM_CTS , LVL.LVL_CTS , LVL.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' THEN VWITM.VWITM_SEQNO ELSE NULL END AS VWITM_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS RSPNS ON PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_PTCP_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN ON RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID = QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID AND PTCP.SRVY_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM VWITM ON RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID = VWITM.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND RSPNS.SRVY_VWITM_ID = VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL LVL ON LVL.SRVY_QSTN_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND LVL.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID WHERE PTCP.SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND (SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} OR UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId})) ORDER BY PTCP.SRVY_ID, PTCP.USER_ID, SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO

/* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyQstnRspnsDistributionList 설 명 : 설문문항답변분포목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_VWITM_ID , A.SRVY_QSTN_ID , A.VWITM_CTS , A.VWITM_SEQNO , A.JOIN_CNT , A.TOT_JOIN_CNT , A.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN '0' ELSE REPLACE(TO_CHAR( CASE WHEN A.RNUM = 1 THEN 100 - ACUM_RATIO ELSE A.RATIO END ), '.0', '') END AS RATIO FROM ( SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.QNUM ORDER BY A.JOIN_CNT DESC, A.VWITM_SEQNO DESC) AS RNUM , ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1) AS RATIO , SUM(ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1)) OVER (PARTITION BY A.QNUM ORDER BY A.JOIN_CNT DESC, A.VWITM_SEQNO DESC) - ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1) AS ACUM_RATIO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.SRVY_QSTN_ID , A.SRVY_VWITM_ID , A.VWITM_CTS , A.SRVY_SEQNO , A.QSTN_SEQNO , A.VWITM_SEQNO , A.JOIN_CNT , A.TOT_JOIN_CNT , A.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , A.QNUM FROM ( SELECT A.* , DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY A.SRVY_QSTN_ID) AS QNUM FROM ( WITH RSPNS AS ( SELECT RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID , RSPNS.SRVY_VWITM_ID , RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS RSPNS ON PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_PTCP_ID AND RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{srvyQstnId} WHERE PTCP.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND PTCP.USER_ID IN (SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}) ) SELECT SRVY.SRVY_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO , QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID , VWITM.VWITM_SEQNO , VWITM.VWITM_CTS , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , LVL.LVL_SEQNO , CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD IN ('ONE_CHC', 'MLT_CHC', 'OX_CHC') THEN (SELECT COUNT(SRVY_VWITM_ID) FROM RSPNS WHERE SRVY_VWITM_ID = VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID) WHEN QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' THEN (SELECT COUNT(SRVY_VWITM_ID) FROM RSPNS WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID = QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND SRVY_VWITM_ID = VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID AND SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID = LVL.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID) ELSE 0 END AS JOIN_CNT , CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD IN ('ONE_CHC', 'MLT_CHC', 'OX_CHC', 'LONG_TEXT') THEN (SELECT COUNT(SRVY_QSTN_ID) FROM RSPNS WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID = QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID) WHEN QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' THEN (SELECT COUNT(SRVY_QSTN_ID) FROM RSPNS WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID = QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND SRVY_VWITM_ID = VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID) END AS TOT_JOIN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON SRVY.SRVY_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID AND SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId} JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN ON SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{srvyQstnId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM VWITM ON QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID = VWITM.SRVY_QSTN_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL LVL ON QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID = LVL.SRVY_QSTN_ID WHERE SRVY.DELYN = 'N' AND SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} ORDER BY QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO, VWITM.VWITM_SEQNO, LVL.LVL_SEQNO ) A ) A ) A ) A ORDER BY A.SRVY_SEQNO, A.QSTN_SEQNO, A.VWITM_SEQNO
